blocks.text: England's European fate: Newcastle at Camp Nou, Liverpool must turn the tide
Level on aggregate — this is European football at its purest. One match, one winner, no second chances. Camp Nou at 18:45.
After Chelsea's 0-3 humiliation by PSG and City's exit to Real Madrid on Tuesday, Liverpool trail 1-0 — Anfield's European nights are English football's last hope this round.
